verses.text: The redeemed sing, 'O LORD, I will praise thee,' for His anger is turned away and He has become their salvation; 'with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.' Saved from wrath, they rejoice. The springs of God's grace are an endless source of joy.

The redeemed sing, 'O LORD, I will praise thee,' for His anger is turned away and He has become their salvation; 'with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.' Saved from wrath, they rejoice. The springs of God's grace are an endless source of joy.

The redeemed sing, 'O LORD, I will praise thee,' for His anger is turned away and He has become their salvation; 'with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.' Saved from wrath, they rejoice. The springs of God's grace are an endless source of joy.

They call one another to praise the LORD, declare His doings, and 'cry out and shout' for the Holy One is great in their midst. Salvation overflows in song. The presence of the Holy One among His people fills them with praise.
